recommendations.title: Lo and Behold: Reveries of the Connected World
recommendations.overview: Werner Herzog's exploration of the Internet and the connected world.

recommendations.title: My Best Fiend
recommendations.overview: A film that describes the love-hate relationship between Werner Herzog and Klaus Kinski, the deep trust between the director and the actor, and their independently and simultaneously hatched plans to murder one another.

recommendations.title: Lessons of Darkness
recommendations.overview: Shortly after the Gulf War, oil fires were raging all through Kuwait. In the week before this sea of fire would be extinguished, Werner Herzog filmed this apocalyptic landscape with its murky skies, scorched earth and capricious flames.

recommendations.title: Grizzly Man
recommendations.overview: Follows the story of "Grizzly Man" Timothy Treadwell and what the thirteen summers in a National Park in Alaska were like in his attempt to protect the grizzly bears. The film is full of unique images and a look into the spirit of a man who sacrifice

recommendations.title: Cave of Forgotten Dreams
recommendations.overview: Werner Herzog gains exclusive access to film inside the Chauvet caves of Southern France, capturing the oldest known pictorial creations of humankind in their astonishing natural setting.

recommendations.title: Into the Abyss
recommendations.overview: We do not know when and how we will die. Death Row inmates do. Werner Herzog embarks on a dialogue with Death Row inmates, asks questions about life and death and looks deep into these individuals, their stories, their crimes.

recommendations.title: Rescue Dawn
recommendations.overview: A US Fighter pilot's epic struggle of survival after being shot down on a mission over Laos during the Vietnam War.

recommendations.title: Nosferatu the Vampyre
recommendations.overview: A real estate agent leaves behind his beautiful wife to go to Transylvania to visit the mysterious Count Dracula and formalize the purchase of a property in Wismar.

recommendations.title: Happy People: A Year in the Taiga
recommendations.overview: In the center of the story is the life of the indigenous people of the village Bakhtia at the river Yenisei in the Siberian Taiga. The camera follows the protagonists in the village over a period of a year. The natives, whose daily routines have bare

recommendations.title: Fitzcarraldo
recommendations.overview: Fitzcarraldo is a dreamer who plans to build an opera house in Iquitos, in the Peruvian Amazon, so, in order to finance his project, he embarks on an epic adventure to collect rubber, a very profitable product, in a remote and unexplored region of th
